brand.name: mailc
brand.tagline: Your design tokens. Your email. Zero config.
brand.previewText: See how mailc's theme config system turns your brand colors into pixel-perfect emails — automatically.
brand.address: Building the future of email, one compile at a time.

hero.headline: Your brand tokens, compiled into every email.
hero.subline: Define your colors, typography, and spacing once in mailc.config.js — then use them as Tailwind classes across every template.

configSnippet.title: One config. Every template.
configSnippet.description: Add a theme.extend block to your mailc.config.js. Every key you define becomes a Tailwind-style class you can use directly in your markup.

features.title: Colors
features.description: Flat keys, nested palettes, or both. bg-brand, bg-brand-light, text-surface — all resolved automatically.

features.title: Typography
features.description: Custom font stacks via fontFamily. Applied globally with mc-attributes or per-component as a class.

features.title: Spacing & Sizing
features.description: Custom steps in your spacing scale. Use p-card, gap-section — any key you name.

features.title: Border Radius
features.description: Name your corner sizes. rounded-card becomes border-radius:12px everywhere.

features.title: rem → px auto-conversion
features.description: Paste Tailwind's default theme as-is. mailc converts every rem value to px at build time — email clients require it.

features.title: Accessibility baked in
features.description: Enable accessibility.enabled to get automatic lang attribute injection, missing-alt warnings, and WCAG contrast checks.

a11yChecks.note: All images in this template carry descriptive alt attributes
Every text/background pair meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum)
Compiler auto-adds role and aria-hidden to layout scaffolding
